title: Noah : Le sens de la gagne
original_title: Noah : le sens de la gagne
overview: Yannick Noah, the man with 473 victories, shares the techniques and tactics that have made the difference throughout his career, while revealing untold personal stories. This documentary traces four decades of tennis, from the golden age of the 1980s to the present day.
